expectations.text: Generated a weekly report Markdown file
Contains all 4 sections: git commits, TODO tracking, work summary, next week plan
expectations.evidence: Report contains '本周 Git 提交记录', 'TODO 变更', '工作总结', '下周计划' — Chinese headers

expectations.text: Contains actual git commit data (not empty placeholders)
expectations.evidence: Detailed table with 9 commits including hashes, dates, authors, descriptions, and file changes
Dedicated TODO section with scan scope, keywords, and results documented

expectations.text: Uses Chinese section headers as the skill is designed for Chinese reports
